title: RSA Key Generator
description: Generate RSA public and private key pairs with multiple key sizes and output formats
keySizeWarning1024: ⚠️ 1024-bit keys have lower security, not recommended for production
keySizeHighSecurity: ✓ High security, suitable for sensitive data
formatDescription: PKCS#1 is the traditional format, PKCS#8 is the modern standard
generateError: Key generation failed, please try again
securityWarning1: Private keys are sensitive information, keep them secure and never share
securityWarning2: Store private keys in a secure location with appropriate file permissions
securityWarning3: This tool generates keys locally in your browser, nothing is uploaded
